tool.name: google_dorker
tool.description: Generate Google dork queries for security reconnaissance.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Generate dorks from predefined security templates - Build custom dork queries with operators - Discover exposed files, credentials, and directories - Find login pages and admin panels - Enumerate subdomains and cloud storage

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The dork action to perform: - generate: Generate dorks from predefined templates - build_query: Build a custom dork query - list_templates: List available dork templates and operators

parameter.name: domain
parameter.description: Target domain for dork queries. Required for generate action.

parameter.name: categories
parameter.description: Specific categories to include: sensitive_files, exposed_documents, login_pages, error_pages, exposed_directories, git_exposure, credentials, api_endpoints, wordpress, cloud_storage, subdomains, technology_detection

parameter.name: keywords
parameter.description: Search keywords for custom query (for build_query)

parameter.name: file_types
parameter.description: File types to search for (for build_query)

parameter.name: inurl
parameter.description: URL patterns to search for (for build_query)

parameter.name: intitle
parameter.description: Title patterns to search for (for build_query)

parameter.name: exclude
parameter.description: Keywords to exclude from results (for build_query)

returns.description: Generated dork queries with Google search URLs

tool.examples:
# Generate dorks for a domain
generate example.com
# Generate specific categories
generate example.com ["sensitive_files", "credentials"]
# Build custom query
build_query example.com ["api", "key"] ["json", "env"]
# List available templates
list_templates
